category_errors.title: Software install request failed
category_errors.predicted_issue_text: Installer says no permission for approved software request.

category_errors.title: Cannot join secure wireless
category_errors.predicted_issue_text: Cannot join secure office wireless network
category_errors.ground_truth_resolution_summary: The laptop was using an expired machine certificate for the secure SSID. Updating the certificate and Wi-Fi profile resolved the issue.
category_errors.predicted_resolution_summary: Cause: Machine certificate expired. Fix: Renewed device certificate and re-applied Wi-Fi profile.

category_errors.positive: Cause: Machine certificate expired. Fix: Renewed device certificate and re-applied Wi-Fi profile.

worst_resolution_matches.ground_truth_resolution_summary: The reported email was phishing and was quarantined. Because the user did not click or submit credentials, the account did not require recovery steps.
worst_resolution_matches.predicted_resolution_summary: Cause: Sender impersonation from outside. Fix: Quarantined message and blocked similar patterns.
worst_resolution_matches.query: Reported suspicious email asking for credentials
worst_resolution_matches.positive: Cause: Sender impersonation from outside. Fix: Quarantined message and blocked similar patterns.

worst_resolution_matches.title: Email issue
worst_resolution_matches.predicted_issue_text: Cannot access email from Outlook desktop app
worst_resolution_matches.ground_truth_resolution_summary: The mailbox itself was healthy, but Outlook had stale local credentials. Clearing the cached credentials and reauthenticating restored access. The user expressed urgency during the conversation. A secondary issue related to voip_telephony was also reported.
worst_resolution_matches.predicted_resolution_summary: Cause: Cached credentials issue. Fix: Clear cached credentials and sign in again.
worst_resolution_matches.query: Cannot access email from Outlook desktop app
worst_resolution_matches.positive: Cause: Cached credentials issue. Fix: Clear cached credentials and sign in again.

worst_resolution_matches.title: Outlook keeps asking for password
worst_resolution_matches.predicted_issue_text: Outlook desktop client keeps prompting for password
worst_resolution_matches.ground_truth_resolution_summary: The issue came from an outdated Outlook credential cache. After clearing cached credentials and re-adding the account, email access returned.
worst_resolution_matches.predicted_resolution_summary: Cause: Cached credentials issue. Fix: Clear cached credentials and sign in again.
worst_resolution_matches.query: Outlook desktop client keeps prompting for password
worst_resolution_matches.positive: Cause: Cached credentials issue. Fix: Clear cached credentials and sign in again.

worst_resolution_matches.title: Mailbox not loading
worst_resolution_matches.predicted_issue_text: Outlook desktop client not loading mailbox
worst_resolution_matches.ground_truth_resolution_summary: The issue came from an outdated Outlook credential cache. After clearing cached credentials and re-adding the account, email access returned.
worst_resolution_matches.predicted_resolution_summary: Cause: Cached credentials issue. Fix: Clear cached credentials and sign in again.
worst_resolution_matches.query: Outlook desktop client not loading mailbox
worst_resolution_matches.positive: Cause: Cached credentials issue. Fix: Clear cached credentials and sign in again.

worst_resolution_matches.title: Program not responding
worst_resolution_matches.ground_truth_resolution_summary: Crash logs showed corrupted local app data. Rebuilding the local profile resolved the repeated freezes. A secondary issue related to encryption_issue was also reported.
worst_resolution_matches.predicted_resolution_summary: Cause: Local application cache corrupted. Fix: Reset local application cache.
worst_resolution_matches.positive: Cause: Local application cache corrupted. Fix: Reset local application cache.

worst_resolution_matches.title: Need deleted file restored
worst_resolution_matches.ground_truth_resolution_summary: The requested data was recoverable from backup or snapshot history. Restoring the prior version returned the missing file.
worst_resolution_matches.predicted_resolution_summary: Cause: File deleted from shared folder. Fix: Recovered from backup and placed back in shared folder.
worst_resolution_matches.positive: Cause: File deleted from shared folder. Fix: Recovered from backup and placed back in shared folder.

worst_resolution_matches.title: Tablet cannot access work apps
worst_resolution_matches.predicted_issue_text: Device not compliant with company policy
worst_resolution_matches.ground_truth_resolution_summary: The company-managed mobile device was blocked by a stale noncompliant policy state. Refreshing the MDM policy restored access. The user expressed urgency during the conversation. A secondary issue related to disk_space_full was also reported.
worst_resolution_matches.predicted_resolution_summary: Cause: Device compliance policy update issue. Fix: Resync device record and force policy evaluation.
worst_resolution_matches.query: Device not compliant with company policy
worst_resolution_matches.positive: Cause: Device compliance policy update issue. Fix: Resync device record and force policy evaluation.

worst_resolution_matches.title: Recover previous file version
worst_resolution_matches.ground_truth_resolution_summary: A previous file version was available in backup retention. Recovering that copy restored the needed data. The user expressed urgency during the conversation.
worst_resolution_matches.predicted_resolution_summary: Cause: File deleted. Fix: Recovered copy from backup and placed back in shared folder.
worst_resolution_matches.positive: Cause: File deleted. Fix: Recovered copy from backup and placed back in shared folder.

worst_resolution_matches.title: Need deleted file restored
worst_resolution_matches.predicted_issue_text: Need previous version of shared document restored
worst_resolution_matches.ground_truth_resolution_summary: The requested data was recoverable from backup or snapshot history. Restoring the prior version returned the missing file.
worst_resolution_matches.predicted_resolution_summary: Cause: File overwritten. Fix: Recovered from backup and placed back in shared folder.
worst_resolution_matches.query: Need previous version of shared document restored
worst_resolution_matches.positive: Cause: File overwritten. Fix: Recovered from backup and placed back in shared folder.

worst_resolution_matches.title: Application keeps crashing
worst_resolution_matches.ground_truth_resolution_summary: Crash logs showed corrupted local app data. Rebuilding the local profile resolved the repeated freezes. A secondary issue related to database_connection was also reported.
worst_resolution_matches.predicted_resolution_summary: Cause: Local profile data corruption and authentication issues after recent change window. Fix: Rebuilt application's local profile data.
worst_resolution_matches.positive: Cause: Local profile data corruption and authentication issues after recent change window. Fix: Rebuilt application's local profile data.
